column1: # Sample: 203 WR player-seasons (2016–2025) — high-volume cohort (prior-year top tier by workload).
Metric
Prior FP/G | PPR fantasy points per game in year N — baseline benchmark.
Rec Yards / Game | Receiving yards per game.
Rec Yards | Total receiving yards.
Receptions | Total receptions.
Yards Per Route Run | Average receiving yards generated per route the player ran — production per opportunity.
Targets | Total receiving targets.
Rec EPA / Snap | Receiving EPA per offensive snap.
Receiving TDs | Total receiving TDs.
Target Share | Player's share of his team's targets.
Targets Per Route Run | How often the player was targeted on routes he ran — the per-opportunity 'go-to' rate.
Rec EPA / Tgt | Receiving EPA per target.
aDOT-Adj Yds Per Target | Yards per target ABOVE EXPECTED for the player's aDOT. Strips out the deep-shot premium so the leaderboard isn't dominated by downfield specialists.
Yards Per Target | Receiving yards per target. Combines catch rate with average completion depth.
YAC Per Reception | Yards after catch per reception. Pure post-catch production, unadjusted for role.
YAC OE Per Reception | YAC per reception ABOVE EXPECTED for the player's aDOT. Positive = creating more after-catch yards than role implies.
MTF / Rec | Missed tackles forced per reception (PFR's brk_tkl / rec).
Air Yards | Total receiving air yards (sum of pass depth on targets).
Air Yds / Snap | Air yards per offensive snap (downfield-usage rate proxy).
